zh.lifeSummary: Sir Galfrid Avon Tyrrell是Sir Edward Edmond Tyrrell和Lady Marie Senarpont的兒子，於1197年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾阿沃。他於1219年與Catherine de la Haye在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾桑頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1250年在英國英格蘭戴文莫爾哈德 畢曉普享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

variants.name: Terrel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Terrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Tirrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Terrill
meanings: English (Cornwall; of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Turrell
meanings: most frequently an Anglo-Norman French pronunciation of Thorold (Old Norse Thóraldr, from the elements Thórr ‘Thor’ + valdr ‘power, rule’). This name and that in 2 may have become confused with Tyrrell .
from Middle English T(h)urild (Old Norse Thórhildr, Thorild, the latter a rare woman's name from the divine name Thórr ‘Thor’ + hildr ‘battle’).

variants.name: Tyrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Trill
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by the turnstile at the entrance to a village.
English (Sussex, also Kent): nickname, perhaps from Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (origin unknown, but perhaps Old English tyrl).

English (Sussex, also Kent) and Welsh: habitational name from one or more places named with Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (Old English tyrl), often used to describe moving water, such as Trill in Axminster (Devon), Tirle Brook (Gloucestershire and Worcestershire), and Trill Mill Brook (Oxfordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Avon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name of any of several rivers in England (such as the one on which Stratford-on-Avon is situated or the one that runs through Bristol). All of these were originally named with a Celtic word meaning simply ‘river’ (Welsh afon, Gaelic abhainn). Use as a given name may in some cases have been influenced by the popularity of Evan ; a recent trend is to create new given names by varying the vowels or consonants of established ones.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Galfrid Avon Tyrrell was born in 1197, in Avon, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir Edward Edmond Tyrrell and Lady Marie Senarpont. He married Catherine de la Haye in 1219, in Thornton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1250, in Morchard Bishop, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Galfrid Avon Tyrrell est né en 1197, à Avon, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir Edward Edmond Tyrrell et Lady Marie Senarpont. Il a épousé Catherine de la Haye en 1219, à Thornton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1250, à Morchard Bishop, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

Lui sposato Catherine de la Haye nel 1219, nel Thornton, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1250, nel Morchard Bishop, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Galfrid Avon Tyrrellは1197年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアアボンでSir Edward Edmond TyrrellとLady Marie Senarpontの息子として生まれた。1219年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアソルントンでCatherine de la Hayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1250年にイギリスイギリスデボンモーチャード ビショップで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Galfrid Avon Tyrrell(은)는 1197년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 아폰에서 Sir Edward Edmond Tyrrell(와)과 Lady Marie Senarpont의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 토른턴에서 Catherine de la Haye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 모르처드 비숍에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Galfrid Avon Tyrrell nasceu em 1197, em Avon, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Sir Edward Edmond Tyrrell e Lady Marie Senarpont. Ele casou-se com Catherine de la Haye em 1219, em Thornton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Sir Galfrid Avon Tyrrell родился в 1197 г. в местности авон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir Edward Edmond Tyrrell и Lady Marie Senarpont. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de la Haye в 1219 г. в местности таурнтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1250 г. в местности морчард бишоп, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.
